creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Port was deleted with the following reason:

DEPRECATED: Not staged. See http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports-announce/2014-May/000080.html

If the software remains supported/maintained upstream and someone can provide a patch to bring it up to date and in compliance with current framework guidelines, please re-open the issue.

^Triage: Assign to user that resolved
